findings.title: Unauthenticated access to credentials endpoint
findings.description: The /api/v1/credentials endpoint is accessible without authentication.
findings.evidence: GET /api/v1/credentials → 200 OK (0 item(s) returned without auth)

findings.title: Prompt injection via user-controlled system prompt
findings.description: User input flows into the system prompt without sanitization.
findings.evidence: POST /api/v1/prediction → injected content reflected in response
findings.remediation: Sanitize user inputs before including in system prompt.
